examples.en: An insect landed on my arm.
examples.zh: 一隻昆蟲停在我的手臂上。

examples.en: Most insects have six legs.
A butterfly flew over the flowers.
The butterfly has colorful wings.
examples.zh: 這隻蝴蝶有彩色的翅膀。

examples.en: A bee is collecting nectar.
Bees make honey in the hive.
examples.zh: 蜜蜂在蜂巢裡製造蜂蜜。

examples.en: An ant carried a crumb away.
examples.zh: 一隻螞蟻搬走一塊麵包屑。

examples.en: Ants live together in large colonies.
examples.zh: 螞蟻成群生活在龐大的蟻群裡。

examples.en: A mosquito bit me last night.
Mosquitoes breed in still water.
examples.zh: 蚊子在靜止的水裡繁殖。

examples.en: A fly kept buzzing around the food.
examples.zh: 一隻蒼蠅一直在食物周圍嗡嗡飛。

examples.en: Please cover the dish to keep flies away.
A spider spun a web in the corner.
examples.zh: 一隻蜘蛛在角落結了網。

examples.en: The spider caught a fly.
A ladybug crawled up the stem.
Ladybugs have red spotted backs.
examples.zh: 瓢蟲有紅色帶斑點的背。

examples.en: A dragonfly hovered over the pond.
examples.zh: 一隻蜻蜓在池塘上盤旋。

examples.en: Dragonflies have long thin bodies.
A grasshopper jumped across the path.
Grasshoppers can leap very far.
Crickets chirp all through the night.
We heard a cricket in the garden.
examples.zh: 我們聽見花園裡有一隻蟋蟀。

examples.en: A beetle scurried under the log.
examples.zh: 一隻甲蟲快速鑽到木頭下。

examples.en: Beetles have hard outer shells.
A moth flew toward the lamp.
Moths are active at night.
A caterpillar ate the leaf slowly.
examples.zh: 一隻毛毛蟲慢慢地啃著葉子。

examples.en: The caterpillar will become a butterfly.
examples.zh: 這隻毛毛蟲會變成蝴蝶。

examples.en: A wasp built a nest under the roof.
examples.zh: 一隻黃蜂在屋簷下築了巢。

examples.en: Be careful, a wasp can sting.
A cockroach ran under the fridge.
examples.zh: 一隻蟑螂跑到冰箱底下。

examples.en: Cockroaches hide in dark places.
Fireflies glowed in the dark field.
examples.zh: 螢火蟲在黑暗的田野裡發光。

examples.en: We watched fireflies at dusk.
examples.zh: 我們在黃昏時看螢火蟲。

examples.en: The insect spun a cocoon around itself.
examples.zh: 這隻昆蟲在身體外結了一個繭。

examples.en: A moth emerged from the cocoon.
examples.zh: 一隻蛾從繭裡鑽了出來。

examples.en: The larva hatched from a tiny egg.
examples.zh: 幼蟲從一顆小卵孵化出來。

examples.en: A larva grows before it becomes an adult.
examples.zh: 幼蟲在變成成蟲前會先成長。

examples.en: The ant moved its antennae to feel around.
examples.zh: 螞蟻擺動觸角來感知周圍。

examples.en: Insects use antennae to smell.
A bee stung him on the hand.
Some insects sting to defend themselves.
examples.zh: 有些昆蟲螫人是為了自衛。

examples.en: Bees buzz around the flowers.
examples.zh: 蜜蜂在花朵周圍嗡嗡叫。

examples.en: A fly buzzed near my ear.
examples.zh: 一隻蒼蠅在我耳邊嗡嗡作響。

examples.en: An ant crawled across the table.
The bug crawled into a crack.
A swarm of bees flew past.
Mosquitoes swarmed around the light.
Thousands of bees live in one hive.
examples.zh: 數千隻蜜蜂住在一個蜂巢裡。

examples.en: The beekeeper opened the hive.
Dew shone on the spider web.
A fly got stuck in the web.
examples.zh: 一隻蒼蠅困在蜘蛛網上。

examples.en: A bird sang outside my window.
Birds fly south in winter.
A sparrow hopped on the sidewalk.
examples.zh: 一隻麻雀在人行道上跳躍。

examples.en: Sparrows are common in the city.
Pigeons gathered in the square.
A pigeon landed on the roof.
A crow cawed loudly in the tree.
examples.zh: 一隻烏鴉在樹上大聲啼叫。

examples.en: Crows are very clever birds.
An eagle soared high above the cliff.
examples.zh: 一隻老鷹在懸崖上方高飛。

examples.en: The eagle has sharp claws.
An owl hooted in the dark forest.
examples.zh: 一隻貓頭鷹在黑暗的森林裡啼叫。

examples.en: Owls hunt at night.
Ducks swam across the pond.
A duck quacked by the water.
examples.zh: 一隻鴨子在水邊呱呱叫。

examples.en: A white swan glided on the lake.
examples.zh: 一隻白天鵝在湖上優雅滑行。

examples.en: Swans have long graceful necks.
Seagulls circled above the harbor.
A seagull stole a chip from my plate.
examples.zh: 一隻海鷗從我盤子叼走一根薯條。

examples.en: The parrot repeated my words.
examples.zh: 這隻鸚鵡重複我說的話。

examples.en: Parrots have bright feathers.
A woodpecker pecked at the tree trunk.
We heard a woodpecker in the woods.
examples.zh: 我們在樹林裡聽見啄木鳥。

examples.en: Swallows built a nest under the eaves.
Swallows return every spring.
examples.zh: 燕子每年春天都會回來。

examples.en: A hummingbird sipped nectar from a flower.
examples.zh: 一隻蜂鳥從花朵吸食花蜜。

examples.en: Hummingbirds flap their wings very fast.
A soft feather fell to the ground.
examples.zh: 一根柔軟的羽毛落到地上。

examples.en: The bird cleaned its feathers.
The bird spread its wings wide.
A butterfly's wings are very thin.
The bird used its beak to crack the seed.
An eagle has a sharp, curved beak.
There are three eggs in the nest.
The bird built a nest in the tree.
Birds chirp early in the morning.
A little bird chirped on the wire.
examples.zh: 一隻小鳥在電線上鳴叫。

examples.en: The bird flapped its wings and took off.
examples.zh: 這隻鳥拍動翅膀飛了起來。

examples.en: Ducks flap their wings before flying.
examples.zh: 鴨子飛之前會拍動翅膀。

examples.en: A bird perched on the fence.
The owl perched on a high branch.
examples.zh: 貓頭鷹棲息在高高的樹枝上。

examples.en: The chicks hatched from their eggs.
It takes weeks for the eggs to hatch.
examples.zh: 這些蛋要好幾週才會孵化。

examples.en: Many birds migrate south for winter.
examples.zh: 許多鳥為了過冬向南遷徙。

examples.en: These geese migrate thousands of miles.
The forest is home to many birds.
examples.zh: 這片森林是許多鳥類的家。

examples.en: Pollution can destroy an animal's habitat.
examples.zh: 汙染會破壞動物的棲地。

examples.en: A flock of birds flew over the field.
The flock landed near the river.
